case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL/REQUEST FOR TRANSCRIPT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
NOTICE TO REPORTER TO PREPARE TRANSCRIPT
ACCOUNTANT NOTIFIED TO PAY REPORTER FOR COMPLETION OF TRANSCRIPTS.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY MERINO BAIL BONDS
DECLARATION OF EDWARD MERINO AND DECLARATION OF MICHAEL J. WHITLOCK IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT MERINO BAIL BONDS
ORDER BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY-GRANTING MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND DISCHARGING BAIL FORFEITURE, FILED BY DEFENDANT: AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY
NOTICE OF FILING APPEAL MAILED TO RESPONDENT; COPY DELIVERED TO APPELLATE DEPARTMENT
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR MAY-25-2000 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
OPPOSITION MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DISCHARGE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
REPLY BRIEF FILED BY DEFENDANT MERINO BAIL BONDS

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 302, MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT, CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2000, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER 1)THE LAW PROVIDES BAIL FORFEITURES ARE TO BE STRICTLY CONSTRUED; 2)THE LAWS TRADITIONALLY DISFAVORS FORFEITURES; 3)ONE PURPOSE OF MAILING OF THE NOTICE IS TO ENABLE BAIL AGENTS TO PURSUE NON APPEARING DEFENDANTS TO ARREST HIM & BRING HIM BEFORE THE COURT PEOPLE V EARHART 29CA3 840.(CONT)
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY MERINO BAIL BONDS $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
(CONT FROM ABOVE) THE EVIDENCE (MERINO DECLARATION) SHOWS THE PURPOSE OF THE STATUTE IS NOT EFFECTUATED UNLESS THE NOTICE CITES THE PROPER BAIL NUMBER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF APPEAL PURSUANT TO CRC RULE 19.5(E) AND REQUEST FOR STAY OF APPEAL PENDING DISMISSAL, FILED.
